lifecycle.name: on_start
lifecycle.description: Called once, right after the scene loads.

lifecycle.name: on_update
lifecycle.description: Called every simulation tick (60/s). dt is the fixed step in seconds.

lifecycle.name: on_collision
lifecycle.description: Called when this entity's collider starts touching another. 'other' is the id of the touched entity, or "" if it has none.

lifecycle.name: on_destroy
lifecycle.description: Called once, right before the scene is torn down (e.g. a scene switch).

functions.name: x
functions.description: This entity's world X position.

functions.name: y
functions.description: This entity's world Y position.

functions.name: rotation
functions.description: This entity's rotation in degrees, clockwise.

functions.name: frame
functions.description: This entity's current spritesheet frame index.

functions.name: get_var
functions.description: Reads this script instance's persistent state (0.0 if never set). rhai `fn` bodies can't see outer scope variables between calls, so use get_var/set_var — not a captured variable — to remember values across ticks.

functions.name: set_var
functions.description: Writes this script instance's persistent state, readable in later ticks via get_var. Reset when the script hot-reloads or the scene restarts.

functions.name: x_of
functions.description: World X position of another entity in the scene, by its authored id (0.0 if unknown).

functions.name: y_of
functions.description: World Y position of another entity in the scene, by its authored id (0.0 if unknown).

functions.name: distance_to
functions.description: Euclidean distance from this entity to another by id (a very large number if unknown).

functions.name: key_down
functions.description: True while the named key is held down (same key names as behaviors, e.g. "ArrowRight").

functions.name: key_pressed
functions.description: True on the single tick the named key went down.

functions.name: key_released
functions.description: True on the single tick the named key went up.

functions.name: set_pos
functions.description: Sets this entity's world position immediately.

functions.name: move_by
functions.description: Offsets this entity's world position by (dx, dy).

functions.name: set_rotation
functions.description: Sets this entity's rotation in degrees, clockwise.

functions.name: set_frame
functions.description: Sets this entity's spritesheet frame index.

functions.name: goto_scene
functions.description: Switches to another scene of the project (path as listed in the manifest). Ignored if called from on_destroy.

functions.name: play_animation
functions.description: Restarts a scene animation by name.

functions.name: play_sound
functions.description: Plays a sound effect at full volume (overload of play_sound(asset, volume)).

functions.name: play_sound
functions.description: Plays a sound effect (audio asset id) at the given linear volume (0.0-1.0).

functions.name: emit_particles
functions.description: Spawns a burst from this entity's particle emitter (requires a particles component).

functions.name: log
functions.description: Writes a line to the game console, prefixed with [script:<asset>].
